gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 reviewer approved with no actionable findings; content validation remains deferred to strict release_bundle runtime validation.
verification: poetry run python -m compileall -q src tests
what_changed: Strict V1 benchmark release-bundle plans now fail fast when required strict sidecars are missing.
The benchmark-plan CLI reports incomplete strict bundle plans before emitting commands.
why: Release publishing plans should prove they can satisfy --require-complete-v1 instead of deferring missing sidecars to the release_bundle command.
